title: Daedalus Enchantments
description: Daedalus adds a collection of powerful enchantments with unique mechanics, including Holy Judgment, Void Rend, Abyssal Gaze, and more.
body:
[CN]
代达罗斯（Daedalus）不仅仅是一组简单的数值附魔。它为游戏后期引入了全新的战斗机制。从能够无视无敌帧的虚空打击，到能够赋予创造模式飞行的天使庇佑，再到拥有绝美星空渲染的奇迹武器。

本模组旨在为那些觉得原版附魔过于乏味，或者面对强大的 Mod Boss 感到力不从心的玩家提供终极解决方案。

[EN]
Daedalus is not just a collection of simple stat-boosting enchantments. It introduces entirely new combat mechanics for the late game. From Void strikes that bypass invulnerability frames, to Angelic protection that grants creative flight, to Miracle weapons with stunning cosmic rendering.

This mod aims to provide the ultimate solution for players who find vanilla enchantments too boring or feel underpowered against powerful Modded Bosses.

⚔️ 核心附魔 / Core Enchantments
武器附魔 / Weapon Enchantments

🌌 虚空撕裂 (Void Rend):
[CN] 造成基于攻击力的真实伤害。当目标生命值低于阈值时，有几率触发“诸神黄昏”直接斩杀目标。
[EN] Deals True Damage based on attack damage. When the target's HP is below a threshold, there is a chance to trigger "Ragnarok" and execute the target instantly.

☄️ 耀星之噬 (Stellar Eater):
[CN] 终极附魔。造成绝对真实伤害，无视一切减伤、无敌帧、复活机制以及不死图腾（甚至穿透 L_Ender 's Cataclysm 等模组的防御）。
[EN] The Ultimate Enchantment. Deals Absolute True Damage, ignoring all damage reduction, i-frames, resurrection mechanics, and Totems of Undying (bypasses defenses from mods like L_Ender's Cataclysm).

🩸 灵魂饥渴 (Soul Thirst):
[CN] 击杀生物收集灵魂。当灵魂槽满时，下一次攻击将释放巨额爆发伤害。
[EN] Collects souls upon killing mobs. When the soul gauge is full, the next attack unleashes massive burst damage.

⛓️ 诅咒锁链 (Cursed Chain):
[CN] 以降低自身基础伤害为代价，附加基于原始伤害百分比的诅咒伤害。高风险，高回报。
[EN] Reduces your base damage but inflicts additional Cursed Damage based on a percentage of the raw damage. High risk, high reward.

💔 虚空破壁 (Void Breach):
[CN] 攻击强制移除目标的无敌帧（i-frames）并突破伤害上限（Damage Cap）。这是对抗高频无敌 Boss 的利器。
[EN] Attacks forcibly remove the target's invulnerability frames (i-frames) and bypass Damage Caps. Essential for fighting bosses with frequent i-frames.

🩸 罪孽印记 (Mark of Sin):
[CN] 攻击施加负面效果，周期性扣除目标最大生命值百分比的血量。
[EN] Inflicts a debuff that periodically drains a percentage of the target's Max HP.

🌱 生命虹吸 (Life Siphon):
[CN] 攻击时基于造成的伤害回复自身生命值。
[EN] Heals the attacker based on the damage dealt.

⚖️ 神圣裁决 (Divine Judgment):
[CN] 对亡灵生物造成毁灭性打击。攻击僵尸村民时有几率直接将其治愈。
[EN] Deals devastating damage to Undead mobs. Has a chance to instantly cure Zombie Villagers upon attacking.
护甲与工具 / Armor & Tools

🛡️ 不朽 (Immortal):
[CN] 受伤后获得动态减伤护盾，并免疫有害药水效果。
[EN] Grants a dynamic damage reduction shield upon taking damage and provides immunity to harmful potion effects.

🪽 天使的加护 (Angelic Protection):
[CN] 提供针对亡灵的减伤。当附魔等级足够高时，赋予玩家创造模式飞行能力。
[EN] Provides damage reduction against Undead. At high levels, grants the player Creative Flight.

👁️ 深渊凝视 (Abyssal Gaze):
[CN] 当你注视敌人时，深渊也在注视着它。降低被注视目标的护甲与攻击力。
[EN] When you gaze at an enemy, the Abyss gazes back. Reduces the armor and damage of the target you are looking at.

🏹 代达罗斯之弓 (Daedalus Bow):
[CN] 极大幅度提升弓、弩及三叉戟的蓄力速度。
[EN] Significantly increases the charging speed of Bows, Crossbows, and Tridents.

✨ 视觉效果 / Visuals
[CN]
本模组包含独特的渲染系统：

星空渲染 (Cosmic Shader)： 拥有特定附魔（如耀星之噬）的物品将拥有动态的深空宇宙材质。
动态文本： 附魔描述在物品栏中拥有流光和抖动特效。
[EN]
This mod features a unique rendering system:

Cosmic Shader: Items with specific enchantments (like Stellar Eater) feature a dynamic deep-space cosmic texture.
Dynamic Text: Enchantment descriptions in tooltips feature iridescent and jittery effects.
⚙️ 配置 / Configuration
[CN]
所有的附魔数值、开启状态、最大等级以及是否作为宝藏附魔均可在 config/daedalus-common.toml 中进行详细配置。

[EN]
All enchantment values, enabled status, max levels, and treasure status are fully configurable in config/daedalus-common.toml.
